claim_blocked_if: mean balanced_accuracy of best candidate model is within 1% of logistic regression mean balanced_accuracy or effect-to-noise ratio < 1.5
claim_enabled_if: mean balanced_accuracy of best candidate model > mean balanced_accuracy of logistic regression by at least 2% and effect-to-noise ratio > 2 across 10 seeds
hypothesis: A Transformer-based model (e.g., HART) robustly outperforms logistic regression on public sensor classification data across repeated seeds.
question: Can a nonlinear model robustly outperform logistic regression on public sensor classification data across repeated seeds?
